ipc_text: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
bns_text: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
punishment_change: No major change in quantum, but structural re-ordering.

topic: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property
ipc_text: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property...
bns_text: Whoever cheats and thereby dishonestly induces the person deceived to deliver any property...

ipc_text: Whoever commits rape, shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment...
bns_text: Whoever commits rape, shall be punished with rigorous imprisonment...
punishment_change: Enhanced minimum sentences in certain aggravated cases.
description_change: Broader definitions and gender-neutrality in certain sub-sections.

ipc_text: Whoever by words, either spoken or written... brings into hatred or contempt... the Government...
bns_text: Whoever, purposely or knowingly, by words, either spoken or written... excites secession or armed rebellion or subversive activities...
punishment_change: Term 'Sedition' removed. Focus on sovereignty and integrity.
description_change: Significant change. Sedition replaced by 'Acts endangering sovereignty'.

ipc_text: Whoever does any act with such intention or knowledge...
bns_text: Whoever does any act with such intention or knowledge...
